task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application window and main menu are visible on the screen.
The Sudoku game interface is visible within GCompris, showing a Sudoku grid.
A 4x4 Sudoku grid (Baby-Sudoku with 2x2 regions) is visible, which corresponds to the first level of the activity.

task_completion.description: Solve the grid until the congratulations animation appears
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 4x4 Sudoku grid is completely and correctly filled, and a GCompris success/congratulations animation (such as a smiling flower, stars, or glowing effect) is displayed on the screen.
The final screenshot in the trajectory shows the GCompris application window still open and running.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface to solve the puzzle
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GCompris GUI being actively used (e.g., mouse cursor selecting cells or items), rather than terminal windows executing scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual GCompris software
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to the standalone GCompris application, not a web browser playing a different Sudoku game, a text editor, or an image viewer displaying a static picture.

integrity.description: The puzzle was solved using genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers or symbols in the Sudoku grid match the native UI style of GCompris and appear to have been placed using the game's mechanics, without signs of image manipulation or overlaid text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Sudoku is a verified activity in GCompris, typically located in the Games (or Puzzle/Strategy) category. The first puzzle level is a 4x4 Baby-Sudoku with 2x2 regions. When a puzzle is successfully completed in GCompris, the software typically displays a distinct congratulations animation, such as a smiling flower, stars, or a glowing effect.
